allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: bundle metacubexd UI at build time and fix BLOCK_QUIC rule position

- Pre-download metacubexd into Docker image to avoid runtime download failures
- Move QUIC drop rule into clashboth prerouting chain before TPROXY
- Remove external-ui-url from config since UI is now built-in

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
refactor: overhaul DNS config, add subscription domain DIRECT rule, remove TUN

- Enhance DNS with DoH upstreams, proxy-server-nameserver, and comprehensive fake-ip-filter
- Auto-extract subscription URL domain and route it via DIRECT to avoid bootstrap issues
- Remove TUN-related config from base.yaml, entrypoint.sh, and docker-compose.yml
- Clean up unused config entries \(hosts, users, profile\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
